title: Sustained Nourishment
subtitle: Building strength with variety
description: At this stage, your body continues to need more nourishment to support steady growth. Including a variety of nutrient-dense foods and maintaining consistent meals can help support your energy and overall strength.
nutrition_focus: Increase meal density with nutrient-rich foods
Include a wide variety of food groups
Maintain regular meal timing and portion balance
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, beans, carrots, and broccoli
Protein sources like milk, curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: A variety of balanced and nourishing foods helps support your strength and energy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and varied meals help support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid sudden increases in portion sizes
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced variety supports steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Including a variety of iron-rich foods supports improved energy and strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Variety in meals helps build strength effectively.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent and balanced meals support a calm routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A varied and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
nutrition_focus: Include a variety of nutrients in meals
thyroid.reassurance: Balanced variety supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on balanced variety and consistent meals helps maintain stability and nourishment.
priority_nutrition: Include a variety of nutrient-rich foods
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Variety and consistency support your overall well-being.
